steps.name: create, produce, and consume a smoke message
command: /opt/kafka/bin/kafka-topics.sh --bootstrap-server database:9095 --create --if-not-exists --topic dbx-smoke --partitions 1 --replication-factor 1; printf 'DBX smoke\n' | /opt/kafka/bin/kafka-console-producer.sh --bootstrap-server database:9095 --topic dbx-smoke; /opt/kafka/bin/kafka-console-consumer.sh --bootstrap-server database:9095 --topic dbx-smoke --from-beginning --max-messages 1 --timeout-ms 10000
